name: Holiday Party Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can water chestnuts, drained and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Mix well.
3. Cover and chill.
4. Stir before serving.
5. Garnish with additional green onion if desired.
6. Refrigerate leftovers.
7. Serve with potato chips or fresh vegetables.
8. Makes about 2 1/2 cups.
